# Resource (rootly_edge_connector_action)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `edge_connector_id` (String) The ID of the edge connector
- `name` (String) Action name

### Optional

- `action_type` (String) Action type. Value must be one of `script`, `http`.
- `description` (String) Action description
- `icon` (String) Action icon. Value must be one of `bolt`, `bolt-slash`, `cog`, `command-line`, `code-bracket`, `server`, `server-stack`, `play`, `arrow-path`, `wrench-screwdriver`, `cube`, `rocket-launch`.
- `parameters` (Block List) Parameter definitions (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--parameters))
- `timeout` (Number) Timeout in seconds

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `last_executed_at` (String)
- `slug` (String) Action slug
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedblock--parameters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `parameters`

Optional:

- `default` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `options` (List of String)
- `required` (Boolean)
- `type` (String)

## Import

rootly_edge_connector_action can be imported using the [`import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import).

```sh
terraform import rootly_edge_connector_action.primary a816421c-6ceb-481a-87c4-585e47451f24
```

Or using an [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import).

```terraform
import {
  to = rootly_edge_connector_action.primary
  id = "a816421c-6ceb-481a-87c4-585e47451f24"
}
```

Locate the resource id in the web app, or retrieve it by listing resources through the API if it's not visible in the web app.

HCL can be generated from the import block using the `-generate-config-out` flag.

```sh
terraform plan -generate-config-out=generated.tf
```
